---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior on the Appriyo website
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: Shahajalal-Mahmud
---

## 🔍 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🧪 Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **Device:** [Desktop / Tablet / Mobile]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows, macOS, iOS, Android]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- **Browser Version:** [e.g., 120]
- **Screen Size:** [e.g., 1920x1080, 375x667]

## 🎨 Theme Context

- [ ] Light theme
- [ ] Dark theme
- [ ] Both themes

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (console errors, network issues, etc.)

## 🏷️ Severity

- [ ] Critical – Blocks core functionality / breaks site
- [ ] High – Major feature broken
- [ ] Medium – Annoying but has workaround
- [ ] Low – Minor visual glitch or typo

## 👤 Assignee (Auto-assigned)

@Shahjalal-Mahmud will triage and handle this report.

---

_Before submitting, please check if a similar issue already exists._
